_comment: AUDIT-SANDBOXED jscpd (copy-paste detector) config. Targets src/*.cts (the 83-file source of truth) and the prompt corpus. NEVER targets the gitignored compiled gsd-core/bin/lib/*.cjs (false-dup guard: source/artifact pairs would register as clones). NOT wired into the package devDeps/CI. Run from repo root: npx -y jscpd --config docs/audit/instrumentation/.jscpd.json
